queries.question: Are any types of social media content common for all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Social_Media.type  from Streaming_Service_Social_Media join Social_Media on Streaming_Service_Social_Media.social_media_id = Social_Media.social_media_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Social_Media.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Social_Media.social_media_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Social_Media.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: For every streaming service, what type of social media content does it have?
queries.sql: select streaming_service.service_name , social_media.type from Streaming_Service_Social_Media join Social_Media on Streaming_Service_Social_Media.social_media_id = Social_Media.social_media_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Social_Media.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?type WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_social_media a :Streaming_Service_Social_Media .
  ?social_media a :Social_Media .
  ?streaming_service_social_media p:hasSocial_Media ?social_media .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_social_media p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?social_media p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display the type of social media content we have on each streaming service
